headline: Trump's Iran Peace Hype PAUSED 💥🛑 – Bomb Threats GO BRRR 😤💣
text:
ORANGE MAN 🍊👨‍💼 Trump DADDY dropping HOT TAKES 🔥📢 on Iran PEACE DEAL 🕊️💋 but with MASSIVE CAVEATS 😏🚫! Paused that thicc 'Project Freedom' 🚢🆓 convoy thru Strait of Hormuz 🌊🔥 cuz he SIMPED HARD 🤤 for a 'Complete and Final Agreement' 📜🍆 – oil markets MOONED 🚀🛢️ hopes SOARING 🦅📈 like Elon’s Starship! But nah bby, Donnie flipped SCRIPT 📖💥 Wednesday morn: 'Big ASSUMPTION' 😂🤏 if no deal, BOMBS at 'MUCH HIGHER LEVEL' 💣🔥📈 than Epic Fury SLAY-fest! Marco Rubio 👨‍💼🇺🇸 just said strikes OVER 🛑⚔️ less than 24hrs ago – Trump yo-yo-ing HARDER than MTG's conspiracies 🤪🌀!

Iran SIMPS 👳‍♂️ reviewing US PROPOSAL 📋😏, US leaks spilling TEA ☕ on one-page MEMO 📄✨ to END Gulf WAR 🗡️💥 – Pakistan mediators WHISPERING 'We CLOSE AF soon' 👀🔒! Axios/Reuters hyping 14-POINT BANGER 📊🍆: shut hostilities 🚫⚔️, UNBLOCK Hormuz 🚢🌊, LIFT sanctions 🤑🚀, CURB nuke dreams ☢️🚫. But Iranian MP Ebrahim Rezaei 💪📱 calls it AMERIBOOS 'WISH LIST' 😂🧞‍♂️ – 'Finger on TRIGGER 🔫😈, gimme CONCESSIONS or BUST!' Tehran ROASTED Trump's uranium yank claim 🟡🚫 from April like 'FAKE NEWS' 📰🤥!

EXPERT SIMPS weighing in: Grant Rumley 🧠📈 (Biden/Trump vet) to BBC: 'Admin THINKS deal POSSIBLE 🕊️💦 but we've SEEN COLLAPSES 💥😩 at last sec!' Mick Mulroy 🪖 Pentagon bro: 'Project Freedom PAUSE murky AF 🌫️ – 1500 ships STUCK 🚢😭 even with US umbrella ☔🇺🇸, Iran sniffing motives like Zuck on data 👃📱!' Ali Vaez 🌍 think-tank daddy: Trump's IMPULSE KING 👑🌀 no policy PROCESS, shooting ships 🚀💥 & UAE hits 🕌🔥 made him PUMP BRAKES 🛑!

Trump on PBS 📺😍: 'Felt this BEFORE with Persians 🧞, unlikely envoys to Islamabad 🇵🇰 round 2️⃣' – but still COPING 'They WANNA DEAL 💋🤝!' Even if one-pager DROPS 📄💥, Rumley says NO SOLVE-ALL 🧩🚫 – Obama's nuke saga took 20+ MONTHS 🐌📜 to iron out! Shipping nerds: Project Freedom FLOP 🛳️😴 only HANDFUL passed in debut hrs. Trump since April ceasefire 🚫🔥 hyping 'Iran AGREED TO EVERYTHING' 🤑📝 – Tehran: 'Cap!' Will Orange Jesus 🍊✝️ nuke or smooch Ayatollahs? STAY TUNED 📺🍿 for SECOND TERM TWISTS 🌀🇺🇸 like Anthony Zurcher's Unspun TEA ☕📰!
